_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #101: Rhypo's bonfire clause was INVERTED, not off-by-one. Rhyposhouldwood=false means CONSERVE wood; the tooltip (settings-defs.ts:659) promises 'will not spend wood ... until you have achieved your bonfire goal', which means conserve WHILE NOT achieved. The code said 'bonfire > target' -- spend freely up to the goal, then hoard forever after overshooting. It is also the ONLY clause that can fire outside a farm zone (gofarmbonfire is NaN-inert there), so it governed most of the run. Now 'bonfire < target'. Unconfigured players unaffected (hasBonfireTarget requires target > 0). Pinned + positive-controlled in tests/mapfunctions.rhypo.test.ts.
